result.stdout:
Description:
  Generates thumbnails for layout areas (scaffold)

Usage:
  MeshWeaver.ThumbnailGenerator [options]

Options:
  --catalogUrl <catalogUrl>  Full URL to the LayoutArea catalog page
  --area <area>              URL of a single area to screenshot (alternative to --catalogUrl)
  --output <output>          Output directory for thumbnails [default: /tmp/inspectra-static-meshwe-46f18113-76bf012e/thumbnails]
  --dark-mode                Generate dark mode thumbnails in addition to light mode [default: True]
  --width <width>            Thumbnail width in pixels [default: 400]
  --height <height>          Thumbnail height in pixels [default: 300]
  --version                  Show version information
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information
